9b2c8442-170e-4634-a699-d3df3dd87c5c.title: Exposed Terrain
9b2c8442-170e-4634-a699-d3df3dd87c5c.flavour: Exposed terrain offers only scant protection to the most desperate troops, and can be traversed without hindrance.

de395c91-7b43-4f62-921a-2fa59be9e8bc.title: Light Terrain
de395c91-7b43-4f62-921a-2fa59be9e8bc.flavour: Light terrain can provide cover from incoming attacks, but will not slow an enemy's advance or offer lasting defence.

672458a4-6dc0-4c0f-979f-726b7e3ac47d.title: Dense Terrain
672458a4-6dc0-4c0f-979f-726b7e3ac47d.flavour: Dense terrain is an obstacle to even the largest war machines, and can shelter entire squads from enemy sight.

6c9ddc5c-2bb2-49f2-918e-91ac2484e786.title: [ANTI]
6c9ddc5c-2bb2-49f2-918e-91ac2484e786.flavour: Certain weapons are the bane of particular foes.

0fa205b8-bdfc-40aa-b3e4-06517ac7b5ac.title: [ASSAULT]
0fa205b8-bdfc-40aa-b3e4-06517ac7b5ac.flavour: Folding stocks, shortened barrels or lightweight construction enable some weapons to be easily fired on the move.

d750cf2a-6d46-4868-82e5-8b7d649ef614.title: [BLAST]
d750cf2a-6d46-4868-82e5-8b7d649ef614.flavour: High-explosive rounds can fell several warriors in a single blast, but firing them too close to comrades is unwise.

a357a6bc-4391-470a-8fc2-d78576af522d.title: [CLEAVE]
a357a6bc-4391-470a-8fc2-d78576af522d.flavour: With sufficient might or skill, warriors may sweep blades or talons through their foes in long lethal arcs.

88a8c99f-4742-421a-acd0-a5efd28a370e.title: [CLOSE-QUARTERS]
88a8c99f-4742-421a-acd0-a5efd28a370e.flavour: Weapons designed for close-quarters fighting can be wielded effectively even in the press of melee combat.

0cadfcd2-6beb-4b54-8848-295d5792556f.title: Deadly Demise
0cadfcd2-6beb-4b54-8848-295d5792556f.flavour: From detonating ammo stores to corrosive innards or frenzied death throes, some targets are deadly even in defeat.

3425f023-9e49-4ce3-857d-929b17277543.title: Deep Strike
3425f023-9e49-4ce3-857d-929b17277543.flavour: There are many ways by which to deploy troops to the field of battle including tunnels, teleportation devices and other esoteric means of transportation.

cb51e767-6f77-4048-a89b-1ad835a77ad2.title: [DEVASTATING WOUNDS]
cb51e767-6f77-4048-a89b-1ad835a77ad2.flavour: The most potent weapons strike with such power that they make a mockery of armour and can cleave through several foes.

96b84d7b-0157-4add-9575-88862c61e320.title: [EXTRA ATTACKS]
96b84d7b-0157-4add-9575-88862c61e320.flavour: Some warriors ride to battle atop trusty mounts that gore and trample nearby foes. Others wield combat weapons that deliver a frenzy of additional blows.

c7bb733f-04ce-4347-9eb8-a604f162d355.title: Feel No Pain
c7bb733f-04ce-4347-9eb8-a604f162d355.flavour: The hardiest warriors refuse to be laid low, even by wounds that should by all rights prove lethal.

8d81a38e-efbc-415a-bc04-bb9ce2de4840.title: Fights First
8d81a38e-efbc-415a-bc04-bb9ce2de4840.flavour: Those possessed of lightning-fast reactions may strike before the opponent can react.

c5847d30-3573-4073-b7ff-932677aa7dfa.title: Firing Deck
c5847d30-3573-4073-b7ff-932677aa7dfa.flavour: Some transports have dedicated platforms or firing ports from which embarked passengers can lay down a withering hail of munitions.

3b63d458-3c92-4f12-9933-260401ee325b.title: [HAZARDOUS]
3b63d458-3c92-4f12-9933-260401ee325b.flavour: Weapons powered by unstable and dangerous energy sources pose a substantial risk to the wielder and those that stand beside them.

9fbc1011-3c3b-4c51-9453-152514301b5b.title: [HEAVY]
9fbc1011-3c3b-4c51-9453-152514301b5b.flavour: Heavy weapons are amongst the biggest guns on the battlefield, but require bracing to fire at full effect.

67cab5db-4aa2-4bd3-953b-99a1017236b5.title: Hover
67cab5db-4aa2-4bd3-953b-99a1017236b5.flavour: Some airborne vehicles can use vectored thrusters or anti-gravity technology to hover and skim over the battlefield, the better to hunt their prey or deploy embarked troops.

7ec0adf2-adc4-429c-be51-4f72d475b83d.title: [IGNORES COVER]
7ec0adf2-adc4-429c-be51-4f72d475b83d.flavour: Some weapons are designed to root enemy formations out of entrenched positions.

dc6fdbe5-ae32-4b61-acad-34301b371fd4.title: [INDIRECT FIRE]
dc6fdbe5-ae32-4b61-acad-34301b371fd4.flavour: Indirect fire weapons launch munitions over or around intervening obstacles (nowhere is safe from their fury).

89d74ed3-397d-405f-bbaf-c5e36fbd462b.title: Infiltrators
89d74ed3-397d-405f-bbaf-c5e36fbd462b.flavour: Many armies employ reconnaissance units who can sit concealed, waiting for the right moment to strike.

f75595af-40c7-4380-b463-9eaf0c304c6d.title: [LANCE]
f75595af-40c7-4380-b463-9eaf0c304c6d.flavour: With the momentum of a warrior at full-tilt, lance weapons are deadly on the charge.

3a0ef3a0-992f-4606-ad80-781d09764b34.title: Leader
3a0ef3a0-992f-4606-ad80-781d09764b34.flavour: Mighty heroes fight at the forefront of battle.

6bce17ba-2379-43ee-9456-01e978f347d9.title: [LETHAL HITS]
6bce17ba-2379-43ee-9456-01e978f347d9.flavour: Many deadly weapons can inflict fatal injuries on any foe, no matter their resilience.

ac5982fa-4aa9-438d-a2f2-5e4aab4e5076.title: Lone Operative
ac5982fa-4aa9-438d-a2f2-5e4aab4e5076.flavour: Assassins and other covert agents are difficult to pinpoint in the storm of battle.

89f011f4-2955-467d-8f46-a6c65f7e4cbc.title: [MELTA]
89f011f4-2955-467d-8f46-a6c65f7e4cbc.flavour: Melta weapons are powerful heat rays whose fury is magnified at close range.

a644aeeb-afa7-4963-857a-4cafc593faad.title: [ONE SHOT]
a644aeeb-afa7-4963-857a-4cafc593faad.flavour: Some weapons are so rare, or so complex and slow to reload, that they can only be used once.

06b34fd4-f95e-487d-b848-a13a2eeef77e.title: [PISTOL]
06b34fd4-f95e-487d-b848-a13a2eeef77e.flavour: Pistols can be wielded even at point-blank range.

3cd6ba94-589b-40b3-aee3-168de89eee4d.title: [PRECISION]
3cd6ba94-589b-40b3-aee3-168de89eee4d.flavour: Precision attacks can pick high-value targets out in a crowd.

92a9a303-c98c-446e-91de-e7ee6698f01c.title: [PSYCHIC]
92a9a303-c98c-446e-91de-e7ee6698f01c.flavour: Some weapons can channel the bearer's psychic might to empower their blows.

a8a7f368-b988-4d0a-ae91-48043f7ca0fc.title: [RAPID FIRE]
a8a7f368-b988-4d0a-ae91-48043f7ca0fc.flavour: Rapid fire weapons are capable of long-ranged precision shots or controlled bursts at nearby targets.

f5a5c2d7-08e1-420d-b7cd-0f5060513f65.title: Scouts
f5a5c2d7-08e1-420d-b7cd-0f5060513f65.flavour: Scouts form the vanguard of many armies. Unnoticed by the enemy, they range ahead of the main force.

eecde9e9-b9c5-437e-8c3d-498cd72499c7.title: Stealth
eecde9e9-b9c5-437e-8c3d-498cd72499c7.flavour: The stealthiest warriors can evade the attentions, and the bullets, of their foes.

1ba15993-f06a-40cb-8b3c-3c273ddbdc7f.title: Support
1ba15993-f06a-40cb-8b3c-3c273ddbdc7f.flavour: Specialist combatants may be assigned to front-line squads to bolster their fighting effectiveness.

2f50e10f-7c44-4a96-a147-7bbaabb0f5ba.title: Super-Heavy Walker
2f50e10f-7c44-4a96-a147-7bbaabb0f5ba.flavour: Monstrous creatures and gigantic engines of war loom over the battlefield like gods given form, striding over combatants and smashing through almost any obstacle that bars their passage.

86cd31da-f914-409c-9b12-20d9604465c5.title: [SUSTAINED HITS]
86cd31da-f914-409c-9b12-20d9604465c5.flavour: Some weapons possess a punishing rate of fire, or can land devastating flurries of blows, tearing the foe apart with relentless ferocity.

0f4d5f92-8ac7-4d05-8b75-4338d7e10a2c.title: [TORRENT]
0f4d5f92-8ac7-4d05-8b75-4338d7e10a2c.flavour: Torrent weapons project clouds of fire, gas or other lethal substances that few foes can hope to evade.

dc5e9efd-0366-49b2-83cf-0e4d7b4dedd9.title: [TWIN-LINKED]
dc5e9efd-0366-49b2-83cf-0e4d7b4dedd9.flavour: Dual weapons are often grafted to the same targeting system for greater lethality.
